overall.description: A first-person perspective sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The clip begins with the player looking up at a flying airship passing between skyscrapers, then pans down to street level and walks through the urban environment along streets and a waterfront promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon looking up at sky traffic

agents.ego_description: standing still and looking up at the sky, tracking the flying vehicle overhead

notable_agents.action: large flying airship with glowing lights moving slowly across the night sky between buildings

entered.detail: tall building with multiple balconies and neon teal lighting
dark skyscraper with illuminated windows and red signage
bright full moon visible in the night sky
tall palm tree fronds silhouetted against the sky
tall palm tree fronds silhouetted against the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view looking straight up into the night sky between towering cyberpunk buildings. A large flying airship with glowing lights drifts overhead from left to right, passing near the full moon. Palm trees frame the sides of the view, and the buildings are lit with teal and red neon accents.

events.description: camera pans down from sky view to street level and begins walking forward

agents.ego_description: walking through the city street, passing between palm trees and approaching intersections

entered.detail: building covered in bright red and white digital advertisements and signage
yellow and white painted pedestrian crossing lines

segments.scene_description: The camera pans down from the sky and begins walking forward through the neon-lit streets. The airship exits view as the perspective shifts to street level, revealing palm trees with neon accents and buildings covered in digital billboards. The camera approaches and crosses street intersections with marked crosswalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with city skyline view

events.description: transition from street intersection to waterfront pedestrian promenade

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront path with the city skyline visible across the water

entered.detail: metal railing along the edge of the water with reflective surface
illuminated building with domed roof visible across the water
building with purple and blue neon trim at street corner

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the waterfront promenade, with the camera walking past a railing overlooking the water. The distant city skyline features a distinctive domed building, while the path continues alongside modern buildings with neon accents. The environment transitions from dense urban intersection to open waterfront walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a towering urban skyline into the neon-lit streets and eventually opens onto a waterfront promenade. It begins by looking straight up at a large, glowing airship drifting past a full moon between skyscrapers accented with teal and red neon. As the camera pans down, the perspective shifts to street level, moving forward past neon-lit palm trees and digital billboards toward marked crosswalks at a busy intersection. The scene then expands as the camera leaves the dense urban center and transitions onto a waterfront walkway. Finally, the movement continues along a railing overlooking the water, revealing a distant city skyline dominated by a distinctive domed building.
